__fixture__.name: index_cache_rebuild_automatically_digest_mismatch
__fixture__.scenario: A search-index shard fails its integrity digest after a disk fault. The index_cache inventory row declares corruption_posture = rebuild_automatically and authority = disposable_derived_cache, so the shard is discarded and rebuilt from the workspace truth it derives from. No user-authored body is touched; no prior artifact is preserved (backup is not applicable for disposable state).

state_segments.note: Search-index shard was discarded and rebuilt from workspace truth. The cache-entry manifest surfaces a stale-index banner until the rebuild completes.

failure_states.note: Informational: a persistent IO fault would escalate the posture to block_feature_only with a Project Doctor finding.

notes: Rebuild-automatically posture: disposable derived state discards the corrupted body and rebuilds from authoritative truth. No user body is touched and no backup is preserved.
